title: Come Around Persuin
lyrics: Now what you gon' do then Oh, now what you gon' do then Now, now we come through then Oh, now what you gon' do then Oh, now what you gon' do then Comin' through, man What you talkin' bout doin'? What you talkin' bout doin'? Are you shootin' four-fives or you just gettin' screwin'? Or you comin' clean with the bitch when it come with the kid when it come with the kid I ain't gettin' hit, I ain't gettin' shit, I ain't gettin' fucked with eggs I don't even know what we comin' with or doin' I just know that we comin' with pursuant Run, bitch, I'm runnin', I'm bendin', I'm bendin', I'm bendin' It's all dominant, you're just a nominate, just wonderin' Hey, baby, girl, where you goin' with pursuant? What you knowin', what you thought you were doin'? What you trippin', what you probably doin'? And do you sit there, what you been doin'? What you pursuant, what you keep doin'? Are you groovin', are you renewin'? Are you renewin', say it's an outsprint Sippin' when we goin' up, up we goin' up, up we goin' If you didn't know that we goin', that we goin' We got more, don't know for when I don't know if I should even say a word on to ya On to ya, now on On to ya, now on Noddin' out, noddin' out and bakin' it And takin' it and wakin' it And I don't know if I stole from you Or the whole entire street is missin' it And bittin' it and takin' it, like written it Just prescription, is this the scripture written in the 7-Eleven store? Ah, Jesus is above me, y'all, is it? Y'all all know, it's comin', bangin' Know that I got beats, they bangin' Flippin' on the side, flippin' on that money drive These big money we got, we drive, drive, drive Ride when we low, yeah, ride when we high You keepin' comin' through, what you know? Lost a beat, man, we lost the flow Lost my mind, yeah, you know the road out Now I'm back here, pullin' like I'm sittin' there Like it's tough, down to the bone Gotta ride up 40 years, gotta ride up another year Gotta ride up on a year, gotta ride up on a year Money rabbit Around the sun we drive Bingo, bingo, thinkin' like a muck drop Are you mopped up? Are you acid bound? Are you bound? Are you clowned? Can you get down? I know that you're comin', what you want to? I know you're pursuing What you doin', what you blew? Hit it Beat it Are you defeated? I'll hit it up and down Hit the bangers, hit the bangers Hit the bangers all night I tell you ringers, tell you ringers Tell you stories I don't like Don't fight the starlight Got the mob in your head Make the money say
